hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; then echo 'WARNING: You are on protected branch '$BRANCH'. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feature/ConTS-XXX-description'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|git push.*--force.*main|git push.*--force.*master|DROP TABLE|DELETE FROM.*WHERE 1=1)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected' && echo "Command: $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" && echo 'This command is blocked by safety hooks. Request explicit human approval if absolutely necessary.' && exit 2; fi
echo 'REMINDER: Commit message format: type(scope): description [ConTS-XXX]' && echo 'Types: feat, fix, docs, refactor, test, chore'
hooks.description: Remind about ConTStack commit message format

hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot push directly to '$BRANCH'. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feature/ConTS-XXX-description' && exit 1; fi
hooks.description: Block direct push to protected branches

hooks.command: if git status --porcelain | grep -q .; then echo 'BLOCKED: Uncommitted changes detected. Commit all changes before pushing.' && exit 1; fi

git fetch origin -q 2>/dev/null && if git log HEAD..origin/main --oneline 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then echo 'WARNING: Branch is behind origin/main. Consider rebasing: git rebase origin/main'; fi || true
hooks.description: Warn if branch is behind main

hooks.command: echo 'REMINDER: Run pre-commit checks before creating PR:' && echo '  bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun test'

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '(\.env$|\.env\.local|\.env\.test)'; then echo 'WARNING: Editing environment file:' && echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" && echo 'CRITICAL: Ensure no secrets are committed to git.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '(packages/backend/convex/schema\.ts)'; then echo 'WARNING: Editing Convex schema file' && echo 'Schema changes can be breaking. Verify migration compatibility.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '(\.mcp\.json)'; then echo 'WARNING: Editing MCP configuration' && echo 'Changes may affect tool integrations for all agents.'; fi
FILE_PATH="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then bun run lint --fix 2>/dev/null || echo 'Lint auto-fix completed'; fi
FILE_PATH="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo 'Markdown formatted' || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE 'CLAUDE\.md|CONTRIBUTING\.md|README\.md'; then echo 'NOTE: High-impact documentation file modified. Consider updating related docs in this PR.'; fi
hooks.description: Remind about documentation updates for important files

hooks.command: echo 'ConTStack Development Session Started' && echo '' && echo 'Branch Protection: main, master (protected)' && echo 'Commit Format: type(scope): description [ConTS-XXX]' && echo 'Quality Gates: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun test' && echo '' && echo 'Key Commands:' && echo '  /status    - Check RPI workflow status' && echo '  /research  - Research codebase' && echo '  /plan      - Create implementation plan' && echo '  /implement - Execute plan' && echo '  /handoff   - End session protocol' && echo '' && BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; then echo 'ACTION REQUIRED: Create feature branch before making changes'; echo '  git checkout -b feature/ConTS-XXX-description'; fi
hooks.description: ConTStack session start with branch check

hooks.command: if git status --porcelain | grep -q .; then echo 'WARNING: Session ending with uncommitted changes.' && echo 'Uncommitted files:' && git status --porcelain && echo '' && echo 'Use /handoff to complete session properly.'; else echo 'Clean session end - no uncommitted changes'; fi
hooks.description: Check for uncommitted work at session end
